name: PQSafe Post-Quantum Payment
description: Create, verify, and revoke ML-DSA-65 post-quantum signed SpendEnvelopes for AI agent autonomous payments. Implements the PQSafe AgentPay AP2-PQ profile over Airwallex, Wise, Stripe, USDC-Base, and x402 payment rails. Signatures are quantum-resistant per NIST FIPS 204.

operations.name: Create Spend Envelope
operations.description: Build and ML-DSA-65 sign a SpendEnvelope authorizing an agent to spend up to maxAmount on the specified payment rail within the TTL. The secret key never leaves the caller's environment — signing is done locally.

issuer.description: PQSafe address of the human issuer (pq1 + 20-byte keccak hex of ML-DSA-65 pubkey).

agent.description: Agent identifier — free-form string identifying the calling AI agent.

maxAmount.description: Maximum total amount the agent may spend in the given currency. Must be positive.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or crypto token symbol (3–5 chars).

allowedRecipients.description: Allowlist of payment recipients. Rail-specific format (IBAN, crypto address, Stripe customer ID, etc.). Must contain at least one entry.

startsInSeconds.description: Seconds before the envelope becomes active (default: 0 = immediately).

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live in seconds from now (default: 3600 = 1 hour, max: 86400).

rail.description: Constrain envelope to a specific payment rail. Omit to allow the PQSafe router to choose.

dsaSecretKey.description: Hex-encoded ML-DSA-65 secret key (4032 bytes = 8064 hex chars). Required in production. Not needed when PQSAFE_TEST_MODE=true.

dsaPublicKey.description: Hex-encoded ML-DSA-65 public key (1952 bytes = 3904 hex chars). Required in production. Not needed when PQSAFE_TEST_MODE=true.

envelopeJson.description: Canonical deterministic JSON of the SpendEnvelope (RFC 8785 JCS, UTF-8). This is the exact byte sequence that was signed.

signature.description: ML-DSA-65 signature over envelopeJson bytes, hex-encoded (3309 bytes = 6618 hex chars).

dsaPublicKey.description: ML-DSA-65 public key of the issuer, hex-encoded (1952 bytes = 3904 hex chars).

errors.description: dsaSecretKey is required but was not provided
dsaPublicKey is required but was not provided
dsaSecretKey or dsaPublicKey is not valid hex at the expected length
SpendEnvelope fields failed Zod schema validation

operations.name: Verify Spend Envelope
operations.description: Verify the ML-DSA-65 signature of a SpendEnvelope and confirm it has not expired or become not-yet-active. Verification is fully local — no network call required.

dsaPublicKey.description: Optional: override the public key to verify against (hex-encoded). If omitted, the embedded dsaPublicKey from the envelope is used.

valid.description: True if signature is valid and envelope is within its validity window.

agent.description: Agent identifier parsed from the envelope.

issuer.description: Issuer PQSafe address parsed from the envelope.

validUntil.description: ISO 8601 UTC expiry of the envelope.

reason.description: If valid=false, human-readable reason for rejection.

operations.name: Revoke Spend Envelope
operations.description: Submit a revocation request for a SpendEnvelope to the PQSafe revocation registry. Once revoked, the envelope will fail verify_envelope checks. Revocation is immediate and irreversible. Requires network access to the PQSafe API.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for revocation (stored in audit log).

revoked.description: True if the envelope was successfully added to the revocation registry.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when revocation was recorded.

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code from the revocation endpoint (0 in test mode).

errors.description: PQSafe revocation endpoint returned a non-2xx response
Request to revocation endpoint timed out

examples.name: Create a $10 USDC envelope for x402 micropayment
examples.description: Agent creates a 5-minute envelope to pay for an x402-gated API call

examples.name: Create a $500 USD envelope for Wise international transfer
examples.description: Agent creates a 1-hour envelope for a supplier payment via Wise
